productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Canvas Black & Brown Belt
description: A wardrobe essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wac by wrangler have perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes using classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with jeans, casual shoes and a colourful tee or shirt.Length: 85 cmMade of canvas and leather for easy maintenanceTang clasp for a snug FitHoles to customise fitFixed loop near the buckle to hold belt in placeCareMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
